rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §11.173 governs use of school facilities by religious organizations. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 11.173. USE OF SCHOOL FACILITIES BY RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATION.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is topically unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
